Nitrites in Urine 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a nitrites in urine test? 
A urinalysis test checks for different cells, chemicals, and other substances in a sample of your urine (pee). This includes checking for nitrites. Nitrites in your urine may be a sign of a urinary tract infection Â (UTI).
Different types of bacteria can cause UTIs. Many of these types of bacteria change a normal chemical in your urine, called nit
